_comment: Copy this to humane.config.json to change defaults. By default, opt-in is OFF and NOTHING leaves your box. This is the ONLY file that turns it on.

contribute._enabled: false = fully private, nothing leaves this machine (the default). true = you choose to send data per 'mode' below.
contribute._mode: anchor  -> sends ONLY a hash of your latest block + chain length (a tamper-proof timestamp; your content NEVER leaves the box). contribute -> ALSO sends the governed event (actor, action, data) to help train DonDataBrain.
contribute._endpoint: where anchors/contributions are sent. Point it at your own server to keep it in-house.
